# snapshotImage()

**Instance Method**

Returns an `NSImage` object of the current image in the view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func snapshotImage() -> NSImage!
```

## Return Value

The snapshot image.

## Taking Snapshot Images

- **createSnapshotImage(ofType:)**: Returns the current image in the view as an image object of the provided image type.
